HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT SOCORRO PEREZ'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER FOR JURY FEES/EXPENSES, COURT APPOINTED INTERPRETERS' FEES FOR WITNESSES, COURT REPORTER FEE FOR TRIAL DENIED. SOCORRO PEREZ HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: JOYCE LONG CSR# 8620 (206)
